title: ItemBeam
description: Highlights dropped items with customizable colored beams based on tooltip keywords.
body:
# ItemBeam - Advanced Item Highlighting Mod
**ItemBeam** is a powerful visual enhancement mod that transforms how you interact with dropped items in Minecraft by adding customizable colored beams to highlight valuable loot based on tooltip keywords.
## 🌟 Core Features
- **Tooltip-Based Scanning**: The mod intelligently scans item tooltips for specific keywords and highlights matching dropped items with colored beams
- **Full Tooltip Analysis**: Examines all tooltip text including item names, descriptions, enchantments, and modded content
- **Real-Time Processing**: Instantly detects and highlights items as they're dropped or enter your view range
- **Colored Light Beams**: Items are highlighted with vertical beacon-style light beams that extend upward from dropped items
- **Dynamic Animation**: Beams feature animated textures that move smoothly, making them highly visible
- **Adjustable Transparency**: Each beam rule supports individual opacity settings from 0-100% for perfect visibility balance
- **Color Customization**: Full hex color support (#RRGGBB format) allowing unlimited color combinations
- **Priority System**: Rules are processed in order, with the first matching rule determining the beam color
- **Enable/Disable Toggle**: Individual rules can be quickly enabled or disabled without deletion
- **Persistent Configuration**: All settings are automatically saved to `config/itembeam.json`
- **Easy Access**: Press 'V' key (configurable) to open the rules management screen
- **Visual Rule Management**: Clean interface showing keyword, color, opacity, and status for each rule
- **Scrollable List**: Handles unlimited rules with smooth scrolling for large rule sets
- **Validation**: Built-in validation prevents invalid hex colors or opacity values

I got the inspiration to make this mod from a server I play on called DungeonCraft.

If you want to check it out the ip is DungeonCraft.co.

### **Pre-Configured Rarity Settings for DungeonCraft**
- **VOID** - Black beams (100% opacity)
- **MYTHIC** - Red beams (75% opacity)
- **LEGENDARY** - Orange beams (50% opacity)
- **EPIC** - Magenta beams (35% opacity)
- **RARE** - Cyan beams (20% opacity)
